value.code_string:
import pandas as pd

df1=pd.DataFrame()
context.set_variable('df_all', df1)

context.set_variable('df_single', df1)

df_pdf_list = context.get_variable('pdf_file_list')
excel_folder = context.get_variable('folder_files_excel')
i = context.get_variable('inerate_pd')
pdf_file_name = df_pdf_list.at[i,"file_name"]
pdf_file_name = pdf_file_name.replace('pdf','xlsx')
excel_link = excel_folder +'\\'+pdf_file_name
context.set_variable('excel_link',excel_link )

import pandas as pd

df_folder_excel = context.get_variable('excel_file_list')
current_file = context.get_variable('excel_link')
if current_file in df_folder_excel['full_link'].values:
	is_extracted = False
else:
	is_extracted = True
context.set_variable('isExtracted', is_extracted)

AI_prompt = '''

                You are a precise data extraction engine for Purchase Order in pdf file.\n
                INSTRUCTIONS:\n
                1. Identify the PO number, style no, deliery date, quantity, price information in pdf file and put them in json file
                2. PO can file can content multiple items, please put all of tem in Json which user can convert to Dataframe later
                3. item is sequency number, price is FOB Amount, convert e.g $ 950.400 to 950.400 put $ symbol in Currency column
                Return ONLY a JSON object with this this structure for ALL items you find in the file:\n
                [
  {
    "item": "1",
    "style no": "HQ021944A-AA PANTS SPR26 L",
    "PO number": "DOTCOM 1-4500657661",
    "deliery date": "15/12/2025",
    "quantity": "528",
    "price": "950.400",
    "Currency": "USD"
  },
]
                
'''
context.set_variable('AI_prompt', AI_prompt)

import pandas as pd
import json

text =context.get_variable('gemini_cell')
text = text.replace("```","").replace("json","")
data = json.loads(text)


df = pd.DataFrame(data)


context.set_variable('df_single', df)

global_variables.AI_prompt:
You are a precise data extraction engine for Purchase Order in pdf file.

                INSTRUCTIONS:

                1. Identify the PO number, style no, deliery date, quantity, price information in pdf file and put them in json file
                2. PO can file can content multiple items, please put all of tem in Json which user can convert to Dataframe later
                3. item is sequency number, price is FOB Amount, convert e.g $ 950.400 to 950.400 put $ symbol in Currency column
                Return ONLY a JSON object with this this structure for ALL items you find in the file:

                [
  {
    "item": "1",
    "style no": "HQ021944A-AA PANTS SPR26 L",
    "PO number": "DOTCOM 1-4500657661",
    "deliery date": "15/12/2025",
    "quantity": "528",
    "price": "950.400",
    "Currency": "USD"
  },
]
